title: Oracle and OpenAI drop Texas data centre expansion plan: Report
description: Oracle and ​OpenAI have reportedly abandoned plans ‌to expand a ​flagship artificial ⁠intelligence data centre in Texas
content: Oracle and ​OpenAI have abandoned plans ‌to expand a ​flagship artificial ⁠intelligence data centre in Texas, part of the ‌Stargate project, after negotiations dragged ‌over financing ‌and ⁠OpenAI’s changing ⁠needs, Bloomberg News reported on Friday.... [396 chars]

title: US plans to send Ukraine-proven anti-drone system to West Asia
description: The system that is being sent, known as Merops, flies drones against drones. It is small enough to fit in the back of a midsize pickup truck, can identify drones and close in on them, using artificial intelligence to navigate when satellite and electronic communications are jammed
content:
The US has decided to send the anti-drone system that worked successfully against Russian drones in Ukraine to West Asia to bolster America’s defence against Iranian forces.

title: AI increasingly mentioned in children’s stories, research shows
description: Children are increasingly mentioning artificial intelligence (AI) in their stories, research has found.
content:
LONDON: Children are increasingly mentioning artificial intelligence (AI) in their stories, research has found.
